texto: The way individuals live together. The truth of each individual is only the truth of his own narrow perspective. The entirety of mankind and of human qualities is always seen through a prisim, where its colours are broken. Observation is so utterly different from experinnce; there is no hope of fusing their contardictions, as the I and the not-I have been foes from the world's beginning.
explicacao: Citação de Jakob Wassermann sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “The way individuals live together. The truth of each individual is only the truth of his own narr…” articula reflexao, human-relationships, reality em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reality e verdade.
